Amount must be a positive number.
Signed amount hint: Enter a positive amount to credit the balance, or a negative amount to debit it.
Permissions hint: Baseline permissions for the "{{role}}" role. You can grant or revoke extra permissions for this user.
Supplier workspace banner: You are handling buyer tickets as a supplier: respond within the 60-minute SLA or the ticket escalates to platform support automatically.
No tickets yet: No tickets yet — we are here whenever you need help
No assigned tickets yet: No buyer tickets to handle yet
Mail not received description: No mail or verification code arrived after ordering
Credential invalid description: Purchased mailbox cannot log in or credential expired
Mailbox banned description: Login says the account is locked or disabled
Code not matched description: Mail arrived but no verification code was extracted
Refund request description: Service fell short, requesting an order refund
Other order problem description: None of the above — let a human take a look
Billing issue description: Recharge not credited, billing mismatch, etc.
Product consult description: Questions about features, pricing or stock
Other general problem description: Anything else you need help with
Order after-sale entry description: Missing codes or broken accounts — auto check with instant refund
General inquiry entry description: Billing, usage or anything else — handled by support staff
Pick the order that needs help: Pick the order that needs help; orders past the after-sale window cannot be appealed
Appeal placeholder: Describe the problem: how long you waited, error messages, expected resolution…
Attachment hint: Up to 3 images, error screenshots help
Routing auto check hint: This problem supports auto check: the system verifies the mailbox immediately and refunds {{amount}} automatically if the failure is confirmed.
Routing supplier hint: This order is supplied by "{{supplier}}". The supplier handles it first and it escalates to platform support after {{minutes}} minutes.
Routing platform hint: The ticket joins the platform queue and support will claim it soon.
Ticket friendly footer hint: Every step of progress is synced to you in real time
Auto check running hint: The system is checking for you — no human needed, results usually within a minute
Auto check running hint short: Auto check in progress, results will sync here…
Check step ownership: Verify order ownership and after-sale window
Auto refund done description: {{amount}} has been refunded to your wallet. Sorry for the inconvenience! Confirm to close the ticket.
Check normal description: No service failure was detected, so the ticket was auto-rejected. If the problem persists, resubmit with a different problem type for human follow-up.
Check uncertain supplier description: Handed to supplier "{{supplier}}" first; it escalates to the platform after 1 hour. You will be notified of progress.
Check uncertain platform description: Moved into the platform queue; support will follow up soon. You will be notified of progress.
Ticket created supplier description: Assigned to supplier "{{supplier}}" first; it escalates to the platform after {{minutes}} minutes. Watch for notifications.
Ticket created platform description: Moved into the platform queue; support will claim it soon. Watch for notifications.
Quick phrase resent code: The target platform resent the code
Quick phrase banned: Says the account is locked or disabled
Quick phrase mail arrived no code: Mail is visible but no code was extracted
Quick phrase want refund: Requesting a refund of the order amount
Quick phrase paid not credited: Paid successfully but balance not credited
Quick phrase consult stock: Asking about stock and restock frequency
Reply placeholder: Type a reply, press Enter to send
Confirm resolve content: The ticket closes after confirmation. You can submit a new ticket if the problem returns.
Confirm cancel ticket content: Handling stops after cancellation. You can resubmit if the problem persists.
Ticket reopened; the platform will follow up.
Escalated; platform support will prioritize it.
Marked resolved; waiting for buyer confirmation.
Resolve note placeholder: Explain the fix, e.g. switched the receiving channel and verified it works
Refund amount placeholder: Order amount {{amount}}; leave empty for no refund
Supplier quick reply retry: Retried — please fetch the code again
